name: Hookmon

signature_move.name: Captain Cannon
signature_move.description: Fires a gigantic cannonball from its musket.

description: A pirate Digimon with one eye. It ventures the " Net Ocean " pursuing the phantom White Whamon , and is a courageous man of the ocean that faces up even to rough seas. Its right hand has become a hook-shaped claw, and once it has ensnared its prey, it won't let go at any cost. Its Special Move is shooting the cannon on its left hand ( Captain Cannon ).
